mechanics.excerpt: The Secondary Skill mignt be something unusual such as Martial Arts Stealth or Technician depending on where the NPC encountered and under what circumstances All characters have Language and Perception Skills these are not listed unless the character has an unusually high skill bonus_ Ada them becomes necessary: Bystander This character one of the faceless trillions who fill every inhabited planet; Though rarely threat from combat point of view.
